creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
New York City’s Coolest New Attraction is Now Open 

*ticket and location information is pinned in the comments*

#nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: This is New York City's coolest new attraction and it's not because it has this glass elevator that takes you up and over Times Square to a stunning observation deck, or the fact that it has a see-through walkway with nothing but glass between you and the ground, or even the fact that it's the only observatory that overlooks Times Square. What makes it so special to me is that for the first time ever you can go up another elevator and watch the ball drop from five feet away and even take a piece of New York City history home with you. This is One Times Square.
